hero.version: v3.3.5 Ecosystem is live (deb support added)
hero.opensource: Free to Use • Privacy Focused • 100% Open Source (MIT)
hero.subtitle: The precision orchestration tool for database engineers. 100% Free and Open Source. Built for DDL safety and zero-data-loss trust.

roadmap.title: Future Plan
roadmap.subtitle: Making TheAndb a professional tool for everyone.

phase2.title: Better Foundation
phase2.desc: Mastering MySQL. Core SSH & Safe Mode.

phase4.title: Enterprise
phase4.desc: Team Tools, Cloud Sync & Audit Logs.

focus.pg_desc: Supporting advanced MySQL features like Triggers and Events. Making it perfect.
focus.safe_desc: Refactoring the internal engine. Making it ready for any database in the future.

strategy.title: Our Plan
strategy.comm_desc: The heart of the ecosystem is free and open source. For everyone.
strategy.pro_desc: Advanced visualization, human-centric sync, and local DDL history.

arch.title: The Inseparable Trinity
arch.subtitle: Core, CLI, and UI work in perfect harmony. One single source of truth, three ways to interact.
arch.core_desc: The Engine. Handles the atomic logic, deep-diffing, and secure connections. The brain of the ecosystem.
arch.cli_desc: The Automation. Orchestrate migrations and exports via terminal or CI/CD pipelines with high efficiency.
arch.gui_desc: The Intuition. A premium desktop interface for visual exploration and human-centric schema synchronization.

guide.mac_fix_desc: If you see this error, don't worry. It's because the app is unsigned. Our code is fully Open Source and auditable on GitHub.
guide.mac_fix_note: This will whitelist the app on your system.
guide.win_desc: On Windows, just run the installer (.exe) and follow the steps. Standard installation applies.
guide.linux_desc: On Linux, use the AppImage or your preferred package manager. For GUI, ensure FUSE is installed.

demo.title: See it in Action
demo.subtitle: Experience the most intuitive way to visualize, compare, and sync your database schemas.
demo.placeholder_note: User is currently recording... placeholder ready.

dumps.title: Compare SQL Dumps
dumps.subtitle: No live database? No problem. Compare exported SQL dump files directly to see structure changes without spinning up a server.
dumps.feat1_desc: Analyze .sql files in seconds, no connection required.
dumps.feat2_desc: See standard SQL DDL side-by-side with full syntax highlighting.
dumps.feat3_desc: Try our pre-loaded demo dumps to see how it works instantly.

story.quote_start: "Manual migrations are the last frontier of technical debt.
story.quote_highlight: We're here to bridge that gap.
story.p1_start: After years in the trenches, I realized there was a missing link:
story.p1_highlight: the database is always a step behind.
story.p1_end: Manually tracing schema changes is prone to human error and production catastrophes. As systems scale, the risks grow exponentially.
story.p2_start: TheAndb was born from a radical philosophy: 'Deep before Wide'. Before we expand to every database, we must master one. I asked myself:
story.p2_quote: "Can we bring the rigor of Git to the database layer?"
story.p3_end: the industry-standard orchestration engine. It restores absolute trust and visibility to your DDL management.
story.milestone_note_2025: 2025 Milestone — From CLI only to a Solid UI

journey.title: The Journey
journey.subtitle: From a frustrated backend developer's idea to a complete ecosystem.
journey.m1_desc: Transitioning from a personal tool to a commercial-grade ecosystem. Rebranding to @the-andb and implementing the 'Deep Strategy' for MySQL Mastery.
journey.m2_desc: Beyond the CLI. Developed a high-performance desktop interface with dynamic visualization, real-time diffing, and premium aesthetics.
journey.m3_desc: After one too many data-loss incidents caused by schema mismatches, the question was born: 'If code has Git, why doesn't the database?'
journey.m3_quote: Deep before Wide. Precision is the focus.

features.section_subtitle: Built for teams that demand absolute certainty when touching production databases.
features.tab_compare_desc: Semantic schema comparison across environments. Detect drift before it breaks production.
features.tab_explore_desc: Go to definition, search content, and visualize your schema structure with high-performance Miller columns.
features.tab_monitor_desc: Track DDL history and catch structural changes in real-time. (Note: TheAndb only stores history DDL, not responsible for data loss).
features.tab_settings_desc: Enterprise-grade connection management with localized storage and zero-cloud dependency.
features.feature_export_desc: Extract tables, procedures, functions, and triggers directly to structured flat files for version control and safe keeping.
features.feature_offline_desc: Compare environments entirely locally. Your schemas are never sent to a cloud service. Precision parsing catches structural drift hidden from simple text diffs.
features.feature_migration_desc: Instantly get accurate ALTER scripts derived directly from structural differences between your Dev, Stage, and Prod environments.
features.feature_pipeline_desc: Hooks directly into your CI/CD pipelines via CLI to catch drift before deployment and give AI agents safe access via the MCP server.

privacy.title: Your Data Never Leaves Your Mac
privacy.description: TheAndb connects directly from your machine to your database via native drivers. We strictly commit: TheAndb does NOT export your data. There is no intermediary cloud server, no tracking pixels, and no SaaS subscription required for core features.
privacy.backup_disclaimer: Safety First: TheAndb stores your DDL History (schema structures) to help you track changes. We only store DDL history and are NOT responsible for data loss. Always maintain separate database backups.
